title: Add Config.reload() method with load_dotenv(override=True) for hot-reload capability

requirements: Add 1 class method: Config.reload() in novel_agent/config.py lines 85-100
Call load_dotenv(override=True) to refresh os.environ with .env file values
Re-instantiate LLMConfig class to capture updated os.getenv() values
Update global config singleton with new LLMConfig instance
Return True on success, False on failure with error logging

Config.reload() method exists: verify by rg 'def reload' novel_agent/config.py
load_dotenv(override=True) called: verify by rg 'load_dotenv.*override' novel_agent/config.py
Test coverage >=90% for config module: verify by pytest --cov=novel_agent.config
